assertions.text: Detects migration files in the changeset
assertions.evidence: Step 1.1 reviews migration SQL; Step 1.2 checks migration chain ordering
Never calls list_projects. Uses other MCP tools but skips project discovery step.
Step 2.1 calls list_migrations to check which migrations are applied
Step 2.4 calls apply_migration with name and query parameters
Step 2.3 and 2.9 call get_advisors without specifying type parameter. Returns combined JSON with security/performance keys rather than separate targeted calls.
Same as security -- calls get_advisors once without type parameter rather than making separate security and performance calls.
Step 5.5 calls get_logs and also checks Cloud Run logs for migration-related errors

assertions.text: Proceeds with deployment after migration is validated
assertions.evidence: Phases 3-6 proceed with backend and frontend deployment after Phase 2 migration
